2026-0164
2026-02-26HCControlled Drugs and Substances ActRegulations Amending the Precursor Control Regulations (Additional Fentanyl Precursors) Regulations Amending the Precursor Control Regulations (Additional Fentanyl Precursors) in order to add phenethyl bromide, phenethyl chloride, phenethyl iodide, and propionic anhydride to the Schedule of the Regulations as Class A precursors.Registration: SOR/2026-0039 Publication Date: 2026-03-11
subject: Regulations Amending the Precursor Control Regulations (Additional Fentanyl Precursors)
precis: Regulations Amending the Precursor Control Regulations (Additional Fentanyl Precursors) in order to add phenethyl bromide, phenethyl chloride, phenethyl iodide, and propionic anhydride to the Schedule of the Regulations as Class A precursors.
